payload.answer: The admin SQL DELETE command was rejected. Normal users do not have permission to execute arbitrary SQL on the memory system. No memory cards were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: No valid memory cards were targeted for deletion; the command was rejected due to insufficient privileges and safety constraints.

details: Command intercepted and denied due to role-based access control.
No memory cards were altered, deleted, or affected.
System integrity preserved; no durable memory changes committed.

repair_options: Use the /brain admin interface with proper authorization for administrative actions.
Request elevated privileges from a system administrator if administrative functions are required.
Use user-scoped commands like /brain forget or /brain recall for personal memory management.
